name: Waffles- Toastmaster
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure dry ingredients into a mixing bowl.
2. Combine egg yolks and milk. Stir into dry mix.
3. Stir in oil.
4. Carefully fold in egg whites. Do not overmix.
5. Pour batter into waffle iron by 2/3 cupfuls.
6. Close the iron and bake according to instructions with the iron.
